ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course module */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each course for easy reference */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the course module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is elective or compulsory */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "theory_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours dedicated to theory */,
  "lab_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours dedicated to laboratory work */,
  "internal_marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated for internal assessments */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks available for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the assessment belongs */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, assignment, exam) */,
  "marks_assigned" INTEGER /* Marks assigned for the assessment */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the assessment */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assessment */,
  "is_group" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment is individual or group-based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Student's minor (if applicable) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current grade point average */,
  "status" TEXT /* Student status (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., registered, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment for which the grade is recorded */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student in the assessment */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Instructor's feedback on the assessment */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grade is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Faculty rank (e.g., Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours for student consultations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member assigned to the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course assigned to the faculty member */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the assignment takes place */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assignment */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the faculty member is the primary instructor */,
  "load" INTEGER /* Number of hours the faculty member is expected to dedicate to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which feedback is given */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the resource belongs */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., reading material, video, software) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link or path to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is required for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the schedule is defined */,
  "class_time" TEXT /* Time of the class */,
  "class_location" TEXT /* Location where the class is held */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the class is scheduled */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the class */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member teaching the class */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
